* 企业介绍
* 职位 · 29

STMicroelectronics Ltd. is a global independent semiconductor company and a leader in developing and delivering semiconductor solutions across wide range of application with net revenues of US$9.85 billion in 2006 and market leadership that is spread across many fields. With staff strength of over 50,000, STMicroelectronics offers a fully integrated range of services including manufacturing, designing, development, sales and marketing. To cope with our aggressive business expansion, we invite high caliber talents to join us. (For further information, please visit our website: \*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\* for the worldwide; \*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\* for China ) We offer an attractive remuneration package with comprehensive fringe benefits to the right candidates. Interested parties please send detail resume in ENGLISH to the right email box which we mentioned at each position. We Don't Offer You a Job, But a Career! 公司网站：\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*

职位编号：10238  我们鼓励候选人即使不能满足所有要求，也提出岗位申请，因为我们推崇候选人来自多元化的背景，并为其提供成长和学习的机会。多元、平等、包容（DEI）是我们公司文化的一部分。我们的愿景是“在ST，你可以做真正的自己”，我们重视所有员工的贡献，并对任何形式的歧视采取零容忍态度。  加入我们还可以更好地平衡工作与生活，在工作中享有平等机会。我们的多元、平等和包容（DEI）和可持续发展倡议还包括为女性和LGBTQIA+人群专门设立的员工资源小组、混合办公安排等众多举措，这都使我司成为您职业发展的理想场所。  **JOIN US**  **[点击这里，查看更多信息](https://www.st.com.cn/content/st_com/zh/about/careers.html)** |
